raw_payload.subject: Construction services owner intro
raw_payload.thread_summary: We sent Nate an introduction 21 days ago after a construction insurance roundtable where he said several clients were asking about sale readiness. No response.
raw_payload.last_outbound_excerpt: Hi Nate - enjoyed the roundtable conversation. You mentioned two construction-services owners asking whether now is a sensible time to prepare for a sale. We have been active in that segment and can share what buyers are pushing on right now. Would a quick call be helpful? - Sam
